long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs01.eq01.mad01 et-2/0/5 <-> cbs03.eq01.wdc02 et-4/0/23. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19724
